category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Sri Lanka market (SLSI mandatory certification, SLS/IEC standards, SLSEA energy labelling).

title.en: China-to-Sri Lanka LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入斯里兰卡：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入斯里蘭卡：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Sri Lanka requirements: SLSI mandatory certification and import inspection, SLS standards adopting IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471, SLSEA energy labelling, and TRCSL radio approval for smart luminaires versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与斯里兰卡要求对照：SLSI 强制认证及进口检验、采用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的 SLS 标准、SLSEA 能效标签，以及智能灯具的 TRCSL 无线电核准，并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與斯里蘭卡要求對照：SLSI 強制認證及進口檢驗、採用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的 SLS 標準、SLSEA 能效標籤，以及智能燈具的 TRCSL 無線電核准，並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and in-country importers should verify current Sri Lanka law, SLSI conformity-assessment and import-inspection scheme requirements, applicable SLS / IEC standards, SLSEA energy-labelling thresholds, and TRCSL radio approval obligations with qualified professionals and the relevant Sri Lankan authorities before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及在地进口商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及斯里兰卡相关主管机构核验现行斯里兰卡法律、SLSI 合格评定与进口检验方案要求、适用的 SLS / IEC 标准、SLSEA 能效标签阈值及 TRCSL 无线电核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及在地進口商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及斯里蘭卡相關主管機構核驗現行斯里蘭卡法律、SLSI 合格評定與進口檢驗方案要求、適用的 SLS / IEC 標準、SLSEA 能效標籤閾值及 TRCSL 無線電核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Sri Lanka should expect SLSI (Sri Lanka Standards Institution) mandatory certification and import inspection for regulated lamps and luminaires, with the SLS mark applied on conformity; comply with SLS standards that adopt the IEC base series (IEC 60598 for luminaire safety, IEC 62560 for self-ballasted LED lamps, IEC 62471 for photobiological safety); meet SLSEA (Sri Lanka Sustainable Energy Authority) energy-efficiency labelling for in-scope lamps; obtain TRCSL (Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka) type approval for smart/wireless luminaires; design for a 230 V / 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V); and appoint an in-country importer to clear customs and hold SLSI registration. Sri Lanka has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, REACH-SVHC, or Ecodesign-efficacy regime, so those EU obligations have no direct Sri Lankan equivalent — Chinese GB / CCC documentation does not by itself satisfy the SLSI scheme.
answer_first.zh: 向斯里兰卡出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商应预期：受管制灯及灯具须经 SLSI（斯里兰卡标准局）强制认证及进口检验，合格后加贴 SLS 标志；符合采用 IEC 基础系列的 SLS 标准（IEC 60598 灯具安全、IEC 62560 自镇流 LED 灯、IEC 62471 光生物安全）；适用范围内灯具须满足 SLSEA（斯里兰卡可持续能源局）能效标签；智能/无线灯具须取得 TRCSL（斯里兰卡电信监管委员会）型号核准；按 230 V / 50 Hz 电网设计（50 Hz 与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国的 220/380 V）；并指定在地进口商以清关并持有 SLSI 注册。斯里兰卡没有欧盟式的横向 RoHS、REACH-SVHC 或生态设计能效制度，因此这些欧盟义务在斯里兰卡无直接对应——中国 GB / CCC 文件本身不能满足 SLSI 方案要求。
answer_first.zht: 向斯里蘭卡出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商應預期：受管制燈及燈具須經 SLSI（斯里蘭卡標準局）強制認證及進口檢驗，合格後加貼 SLS 標誌；符合採用 IEC 基礎系列的 SLS 標準（IEC 60598 燈具安全、IEC 62560 自鎮流 LED 燈、IEC 62471 光生物安全）；適用範圍內燈具須滿足 SLSEA（斯里蘭卡可持續能源局）能效標籤；智能/無線燈具須取得 TRCSL（斯里蘭卡電信監管委員會）型號核准；按 230 V / 50 Hz 電網設計（50 Hz 與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國的 220/380 V）；並指定在地進口商以清關並持有 SLSI 注冊。斯里蘭卡沒有歐盟式的橫向 RoHS、REACH-SVHC 或生態設計能效制度，因此這些歐盟義務在斯里蘭卡無直接對應——中國 GB / CCC 文件本身不能滿足 SLSI 方案要求。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Each row must be re-verified against current SLSI mandatory-product scope, SLS / IEC standard editions, SLSEA labelling scope, and TRCSL approval requirements on each review cycle before human_reviewed can be set true.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. Official Sri Lankan regulator or standards-body sources (SLSI, SLSEA, TRCSL, Sri Lanka Customs) or the adopted IEC standard reference are preferred; local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted as the basis for marking a row verified.
